solutions.solution: (d) As, 19 9 13 9 12 1 13 S I M I L A R → 18 26 15 13 14 13 8 → T Z O N F M I. Similarly, 14 1 20 21 18 1 12 N A T U R A L → 15 26 9 6 7 26 13 → O Z I F G Z M. ∴ NATURAL → OZIFGZM
(c) As, 3 12 21 2 C L U B → 24 15 6 25 X O F Y and 14 15 20 N O T → 13 12 7 M L G. Similarly, 16 21 14 3 20 21 1 12 P U N C T U A L → 11 6 13 24 7 6 26 15 K F M X G F Z O. ∴ PUNCTUAL → KFMXGFZO

(d) As, 1 18 8 8 1 14 20 A R H H A N T → 26 9 13 19 26 13 7 Z I R S Z M G and 2 9 18 4 B I R D → 25 16 9 23 Y P I W. Similarly, 16 1 9 14 20 5 18 P A I N T E R → 11 26 18 13 7 22 9 K Z R M G V I. ∴ PAINTER → KZRMGVI
(d) As, 14 1 20 21 18 1 12 N A T U R A L → 13 25 7 6 9 26 15 M Z G F I Z O. Similarly, 3 1 18 5 C A R E → 24 26 9 22 X Z I V. ∴ CARE → XZIV
